rationale: Replaced the ProviderProfilesManager test's StorageEvent constructor init object with a plain Event('storage') plus defined key/newValue properties.
Replaced oauth-terminal storage notification dispatch with a plain Event('storage') plus defined key/newValue properties.
Reconnect actions now navigate to the returned replacement session_id when it differs from the current terminal session.
Broadened safeDisplayText redaction to handle secret-like keys with colon or equals separators, including quoted JSON-style keys and values.
Removed the duplicate Retry button from the terminal recovery actions and kept the Reconnect action.
Broad review summary with no separate actionable request beyond the line comments already addressed.
